title: Contract
description: With Contract, you can create binding agreements to make trade, alliances, services, and challenges in Minecraft more strategic, structured, and interactive!
body:
The Power of Contracts! You can forge real agreements and deals—a whole new dimension to the game! Whether it's trade, services, alliances, or epic challenges, your contracts are binding and bring more structure and reliability to your world. Set rules, define obligations, and hold other players accountable for their promises. This creates dynamic gameplay where strategy and diplomacy become just as crucial as building and fighting.

Features:

    Create custom contracts for various scenarios—from trade and peace agreements to quests

    Ensure agreements with enforceable terms—no backing out!

    Bring more structure to multiplayer by setting clear rules and ensuring reliability

    Negotiate deals, make agreements, and hold players accountable—no empty words!

    Build a complex economy or organize thrilling challenges with binding rules

Whether you're building a powerful empire, managing a player network, or simply ensuring fair deals in multiplayer, this mod makes everything more realistic and interactive than ever before!
